headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (cost of capital and fund flow sensitivity for mid-cap bank) — Green bond market inefficiencies limit sustainable finance impact for YES Bank and sector peers
what_matters: Risk of P/E compression (5-10%) if ESG fund outflows materialize due to weak disclosure.
BRSR, GRI, TCFD, CDP frameworks triggered; risk of SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
Possible increase in cost of capital by 20-40bps if SEBI or global investors question green bond effectiveness.
